_deferred: DEFERRED on Sherlock — do not submit. 12B is the gemma4_unified (multimodal) checkpoint, supported only by bleeding-edge vLLM (0.1.dev / cu128+) which needs NVIDIA driver >=570 (CUDA >=12.8). Sherlock's cluster driver is 550 (CUDA 12.4), so the gemma4-unified image fails at GPU init ('driver too old, found 12040'). The plain gemma4 image (vLLM 0.19.1, cu124) can't build gemma4_unified. Revisit when Sherlock updates its driver or on a cluster with >=570. Config kept for that future run.
_note: A100 Tier-2 calibration (tp=1; 12B bf16 ~24GB). Needs the vllm-openai:gemma4-unified sandbox.
